articles.title: Even Trump says he doesn’t know ‘where the hell’ his own false claim about Black unemployment came from
articles.content: President Donald Trump uses a lot of fictional statistics. He usually deploys them with a breezy confidence. And I don’t know where that stat came from, but I’ll take it,” he said. “I don’t know where the hell that stat come — but we’ll take it.”. The mystery “stat” isn’t true.
